caption: The video features a person with a distinctive, spiky hairstyle and glasses, wearing a white shirt, gold suspenders, and a red bow tie. They are seated in front of a microphone, suggesting they are participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101," as indicated by the logo in the corner. The individual is wearing headphones and appears to be engaged in conversation, possibly speaking into the microphone. In the background, another person with red hair, dressed in a green top, can be seen walking past, adding a dynamic element to the scene. The setting seems to be a studio or a similar indoor environment, with various items and posters visible on the walls.
